tests.test_name: Filename reflects role and source file (no add-ons)
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked
test_hooks.explanation: Stubs the analysis API before each scenario so tests run without a live backend.

tests.journey: A user selects a role and uploads a source file with no add-ons, submits analysis, and verifies that the downloaded Markdown filename encodes both role and source filename correctly.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with API mocked
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'bdd', role 'Product Owner', no add-ons, uploads auth.feature, submits analysis, clicks Download Markdown
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Panel heading is 'Documentation' and downloaded file is named shiftdoc-po-auth.md

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with API mocked
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'bdd', role 'QA Manager', no add-ons, uploads auth.feature, submits analysis, clicks Download Markdown
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Panel heading is 'Documentation' and downloaded file is named shiftdoc-qam-auth.md

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with API mocked
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'bdd', role 'Product Owner', no add-ons, uploads checkout_flow.feature, submits analysis, clicks Download Markdown
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Panel heading is 'Documentation' and downloaded file is named shiftdoc-po-checkout_flow.md

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with API mocked
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'bdd', role 'Product Owner', no add-ons, uploads login.spec.ts, submits analysis, clicks Download Markdown
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Panel heading is 'Documentation' and downloaded file is named shiftdoc-po-login.md

tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)

rows.add_ons: Technical Review, Gap Analysis, Risk Assessment
Technical Review, Gap Analysis, Annotation Summary, Risk Assessment, Recommendations

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked
test_hooks.explanation: Stubs the analysis API before each scenario so tests run without a live backend.

tests.journey: A user selects a role, uploads a source file, and enables one or more add-ons, then verifies that each selected add-on contributes its short code to the downloaded Markdown filename in the correct order.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with API mocked
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'bdd', role 'Product Owner', add-on 'Technical Review', uploads auth.feature, submits analysis, clicks Download Markdown
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Panel heading is 'Documentation and Analysis' and downloaded file is named shiftdoc-po-auth+tr.md

test_coverage_matrix.example: QA Manager / auth.feature / Technical Review + Gap Analysis + Risk Assessment → +tr+gap+risk
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with API mocked
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'bdd', role 'QA Manager', add-ons 'Technical Review, Gap Analysis, Risk Assessment', uploads auth.feature, submits analysis, clicks Download Markdown
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Panel heading is 'Documentation and Analysis' and downloaded file is named shiftdoc-qam-auth+tr+gap+risk.md

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with API mocked
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'bdd', role 'QA Manager', add-ons 'Technical Review, Gap Analysis, Annotation Summary, Risk Assessment, Recommendations', uploads auth.feature, submits analysis, clicks Download Markdown
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Panel heading is 'Documentation and Analysis' and downloaded file is named shiftdoc-qam-auth+tr+gap+ann+risk+rec.md

tests.test_name: Pasted text with no filename falls back to date-time
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked
test_hooks.explanation: Stubs the analysis API before each scenario so tests run without a live backend.

tests.journey: A user pastes BDD content directly (providing no source filename) and verifies that the downloaded Markdown filename falls back to a date-time-stamped pattern instead of a source-derived name.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Pasted text with no filename falls back to date-time
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with API mocked
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'bdd', role 'Product Owner', pastes BDD content, submits analysis, clicks Download Markdown
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Downloaded filename matches the regex shiftdoc-po-\d{8}-\d{6}\.md

tests.test_name: Pasted text with add-ons falls back to date-time with add-on suffix
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked
test_hooks.explanation: Stubs the analysis API before each scenario so tests run without a live backend.

tests.journey: A user pastes BDD content with add-ons selected and no source file, then verifies that the downloaded filename combines the date-time fallback with the appropriate add-on short codes.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Pasted text with add-ons falls back to date-time with add-on suffix
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with API mocked
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'bdd', role 'Product Owner', add-ons 'Technical Review, Gap Analysis', pastes BDD content, submits analysis, clicks Download Markdown
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Downloaded filename matches the regex shiftdoc-po-\d{8}-\d{6}\+tr\+gap\.md

tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked
test_hooks.explanation: Stubs the analysis API before each scenario so tests run without a live backend.

tests.journey: A user downloads analysis results in each supported format and verifies that the file extension in the downloaded filename matches the chosen format.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with API mocked, format 'bdd', role 'Product Owner', auth.feature uploaded and analysis submitted
User is on the Analyze page with API mocked, format 'bdd', role 'Product Owner', auth.feature uploaded and analysis submitted
